questionHtml: State another independent variable that would affect the activity of this enzyme.
markschemeHtml:
temperature
OR
lactose/substrate concentration
OR
Inhibitors / cofactors ✔

Do not accept pH or acidity.

meta.title: State another independent variable that would affect the activity of this enzyme.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.8. Effects of temperature, pH and substrate concentration on the rate of enzyme activity
